Notes: 11th Annual Starters Moravian Winter Classic Opening game
Moravian advances to the championship game on Tuesday at 5:30 p.m. while
Medgar Evers will play in the consolation game at 1:00 p.m. Moravian is in the
championship game for the 9th time in 11 years.
Game.Officials: Jeff O.Brien,  Ron Moser,  John Mitchell
